title: xanthoxalis corniculata f. atropurpurea
intro: Xanthoxalis corniculata f. atropurpurea, also known as a cultivar of the common yellow-sorrel plant, is a type of flowering plant in the sorrel family, with purple-red leaves instead of the usual green. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Xanthoxalis corniculata f. atropurpurea include its potential to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to produce a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
